data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multi-channel capabilities (email, SMS, push notification) for the saga. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these channels. The only related evidence pertains to the marketing campaigns, which do not explicitly confirm the presence of SMS or push notification channels, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming SMS and push notification capabilities.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
